name: Coco
description: The "Gentleman" of the "Four Heavenly Kings" ((四天王, shitennou), he is good friends with Toriko. While Toriko mostly relies on his brute strength, Coco prefers using stealthy techniques and cunning strategy to subdue aggressors. He is also strong defensively; he is immune to five hundred different kinds of poison. name: Conan
description: Conan is the only child of a group of refugees marooned on an island after humanity almost wiped itself out during World War III. When the show begins, he is living on the island with the last of the survivors, a man he calls "Grandpa". Since Conan has been diving and fishing his whole life on the island, he can hold his breath for a very long time underwater. He carries a spear around with him that he uses to fight and catch fish with. Conan is also very strong, and uses his toes in many unorth

name: Darkrai
description: Darkrai is a black, shadow-like creature. It has a small head with a white fog-like ghostly substance billowing from its head covering one of its bright blue eyes, and also has a red spiky growth around its neck. It has skinny arms and long black tatters hanging from its shoulders, similar to the tail of Raichu. It also has black, claw-like hands. name: Emily Brown
description: Emily is an adventurer girl who uses a large hammer that does not match her petite frame. She meets Ryouta, after he defeats a slime in a dungeon. She is honest and kind, but her low drop skill means that she earns little money and lives in the dungeon alone. She has good life skills such as cooking and cleaning.

name: Gerard
description: He is a Blackghost Knight, bound to earth by the pain and anger of losing his wife and kids. He is Kelvin's second contracted monster. As of episode 5, he has evolved into an Abyssal Knight Commander.

name: Hanako
description: She's a half human, half dragon and the sole heir of a noble family who left her castle to know the world

name: Hibiki Houjou
description: She is a second-year student at Private Aria Academy and is in the same class as [Kanade](https://anilist.co/character/38565/Minamino-Kanade). Hibiki's alter ego is Cure Melody. Hibiki is a bright, albeit somewhat klutzy girl who carries a strong sense of justice. She's very bold and outgoing, though she has a tendency for hot-bloodedness that often manifests as a dislike of losing. name: Hikari Horaki
description: Hikari Horaki is the class representative of the class that Shinji and the other Eva pilots attend. Like all of her classmates, she is an unknowing Eva pilot candidate. She has a by-the-book demeanor and takes her responsibilities as "class rep" seriously. Although she frequently bickers with Toji, she reveals to Asuka that she has an enormous crush on Toji but is unable to openly express her feelings to him. She also appears to be Asuka's only friend. name: Hina
description: __Species:__ Chimera Ant __Rank:__ Squad Captain __Squad:__ Hagya's Squad Chimera ant with the appearance and personality of a young girl. Usually seen accompanying Leol and Flutter. Previously named "Hirin (ヒリン)". ~!Hina is later revealed to be a nen exorcist; she is capable of removing curses or any other sort of inconveniences caused by another nen user. Hina's belly expands with the aura she has taken, causing her to appear almost pregnant. After using the ability, her movement is limited.!~

name: Hina Takanashi
description: She is the youngest of the three sisters. In preschool. The only girl of the sisters who is related by blood to Yuuta. She is very friendly and not afraid of strangers. She normally refers to Yuuta as little uncle (Oi-tan).

name: Hitomi Kisugi
description: Hitomi is the main protagonist of the series. Second daughter of Michael Heinz, Hitomi is usually the one who actually commits the heists, and is hence uniquely referred to as the Cat's Eye. Like Rui, she is an accomplished athlete and well versed in a number of disciplines and skills ranging from horseback riding to safe cracking. name: Homare Koiwai
description: He is Sakurai's senior. In the past, he worked in a different department at Moriko's workplace. He often interferes between Sakurai and Moriko.

name: Isma

name: Issei Miyata

name: Kamitsure
description: Kamitsure is the Gym Leader of Raimon City's Gym. She specializes in Electric-type Pokémon and gives the Bolt Badge to Trainers who defeat her. In the games, Kamitsure uses two Emonga and a Zebstrika. In the anime, she uses a Zebraika, Emonga, and Shibishirasu.

name: Kanoko Mamiya
description: __Height:__ 156cm A first year high school student and Hime's best friend. Is fiercly protective of Hime and has romantic feelings for her, which she doesn't want to see returned. Comes across as soft-spoken, but is actually very blunt. Plays the role of a shy kohai and Sumika's "little sister" at the cafe. Usually wears glasses, except while playing her Liebe character.

name: Kaoruko Awata
description: Quirk: Bubble (バブル Baburu) With this Quirk, Kaoruko can make bubbles filled with an aroma that she had smelled at least once before. name: Keiji Mogami
description: Keiji Mogami is "This Century's Greatest Psychic" and a former Psychic who turned into an evil spirit upon death. Keiji Mogami is a very bitter man, sick of the greed and selfishness of humanity. Because of the private dealings he did while alive, he has lost his moral compass and has become a twisted variant of his former self.
